channel.title: Academics on Al-Qadisiyah University
channel.description: Recent content in Academics on Al-Qadisiyah University

item.title: Academic Calendar
item.description:
Academic Calendar 2025-2026

First Semester

Event Date
Classes Begin November 2025
Mid-term Exams January 2026
Mid-year Break February 2026

Second Semester

Event Date
Classes Resume March 2026
Final Exams June 2026
Results Announcement July 2026

Official Holidays

  • Eid al-Fitr
  • Eid al-Adha
  • National Holidays

Download Full Calendar (PDF)

item.title: Academic Programs
item.description:
Academic Programs

Bachelor’s Programs

The university offers over 100 bachelor’s programs in various specializations.

Master’s Programs

Master’s programs available in most colleges.

Doctoral Programs

Doctoral programs in advanced specializations.

Programs by Field

Field Programs
Medicine & Health 15+
Engineering 12+
Sciences 18+
Humanities 35+
Management 8+

Program Specifications (Bologna)

item.title: Academic Regulations
item.description:
Academic Regulations

Undergraduate Regulations

  • Semester system
  • Grading system
  • Pass/fail requirements
  • Academic warning system

Postgraduate Regulations

  • Admission requirements
  • Thesis/dissertation requirements
  • Examination committees
  • Scientific publication

Downloads

  • Undergraduate Regulations (PDF)
  • Postgraduate Regulations (PDF)

item.title: Colleges & Centers
item.description:
Colleges

Al-Qadisiyah University includes 18 specialized colleges:

Health Colleges

  • College of Medicine
  • College of Dentistry
  • College of Pharmacy
  • College of Nursing
  • College of Veterinary Medicine

Engineering & Science Colleges

  • College of Engineering
  • College of Science
  • College of Computer Science
  • College of Agriculture

Humanities Colleges

  • College of Law
  • College of Education
  • College of Arts
  • College of Administration & Economics
  • College of Physical Education
  • College of Islamic Sciences
  • College of Fine Arts
  • College of Education for Women
  • College of Archaeology

Research Centers

  • Scientific Research Center
  • Computer Center
  • Continuing Education Center
  • Psychological Counseling Center

item.title: Course Catalog
item.description:
Course Catalog

You can view courses for each academic program through college websites.

Search Courses

To search for a specific course, please visit the relevant college website.

For Assistance

  • academics@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Program Specifications
item.description:
Program Specifications (Bologna)

Al-Qadisiyah University follows Bologna standards in designing academic programs.

Specification Elements

  • Program objectives
  • Learning outcomes
  • Study plan
  • Assessment methods
  • Graduation requirements

Download Specifications

College Specifications
College of Medicine PDF
College of Engineering PDF
College of Science PDF
College of Computer Science PDF

For More Information

  • academics@qu.edu.iq
